name: Baked Cloves & Potatoes (Christopher Ranch)
recipeIngredient: OR red potatoes -- about 2 inches long
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the potatoes.
2. Toss the potatoes and garlic cloves with oil, herbs, salt, and pepper until well coated.
3. Arrange the mixture in a single layer in a baking dish.
4. Bake, covered, at 450 degrees F for 25 minutes.
5. Turn the potatoes over.
6. Continue baking uncovered for another 25 minutes or until the potatoes and cloves are soft.
7. Open the potatoes and spread with mashed garlic cloves. Dot with butter or margarine if desired.
8. Serves 4 to 6.
